name: Fruit and Angel Dessert
recipeIngredient: 6 oz jar maraschino cherries, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the cake into bite-sized pieces (approximately 8 cups).
2. Arrange half of the cake pieces in the bottom of a 9x13-inch baking dish.
3. Top with half of the undrained pineapple and cherries.
4. Spread half of the Cool Whip over all, and top with half of the coconut.
5. Repeat layers, ending with Cool Whip and coconut.
6. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
